title: row-value updates in triggers do not work.
poc:
CREATE TRIGGER r2 AFTER INSERT ON t2 BEGIN
  UPDATE t1 SET (a,b,c)=(SELECT 4,5,6);END;
key_bug_features: Row-value UPDATE statements inside of TRIGGERs
bug_features_seed: CREATE TRIGGER fuzz_tr AFTER INSERT ON fuzz_t2 BEGIN UPDATE fuzz_t1 SET (a,b,c)=(SELECT 4,5,6); END;
